expectations.text: Mentions App Connection as a prerequisite for the sync
expectations.evidence: "Before you can sync secrets, you need to create an authenticated connection to AWS. This is a one-time setup" and "Step 1: Create an AWS App Connection"

expectations.text: Correctly identifies mapping behavior options (one-to-one vs many-to-one) which is specific to AWS SM
expectations.evidence: Explicitly states 'Mapping Behavior' with options: one-to-one (Each Infisical secret becomes a separate secret in AWS) and many-to-one (All secrets packed into a single AWS secret as a JSON object)

expectations.text: Recommends or mentions Key Schema for scoping managed secrets
expectations.evidence: "Key Schema (Strongly Recommended)" section with template "INFISICAL_{{secretKey}}" and explanation 'Prevents Infisical from managing secrets it didn't create'

expectations.text: Explains initial sync behavior options (overwrite vs import)
expectations.evidence: "Initial Sync Behavior" table with Overwrite Destination, Import (Prioritize Infisical), and Import (Prioritize AWS) options clearly explained

expectations.text: Mentions region configuration for the AWS destination
expectations.evidence: "Region" field mentioned: 'us-east-1 (as you specified)' in the configuration table

expectations.text: References auto-sync capability (secrets propagate on change)
expectations.evidence: "Auto-Sync (Default: Enabled)" section states 'Any change to secrets in Infisical automatically syncs to AWS within seconds'
